promoCards.title: Symphony
powers: Discard a card. {Symphony} deals 1 target X sonic damage, where X = the number of your equipment cards in play plus 1.
incapacitatedAbilities: One player may draw a card.
One player may play a card.
Select a target. Increase the next damage dealt by that target by 2.

cards.title: Symphony
powers: You may play a one-shot card. You may draw a card.
incapacitatedAbilities: One player may draw 3 cards. If they do, they discard 2 cards.
One hero may use a power.
Select a target. Reduce the next damage dealt to that target by 2.

cards.title: Counterfrequency
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
powers: Select a target. Prevent the next damage dealt by that target. Draw 3 cards.

cards.title: Destructive Resonance
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
powers: You may destroy 1 of your non-character cards and/or 1 ongoing or non-target environment card. Draw 3 cards.

cards.title: Encoded Transmission
body: Reveal the top card of a deck, then replace it.
Discard up to 2 cards.

cards.title: Expanded Ensemble
body: You may play an additional card during your play phase.
At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 2 cards.
Select a target. Increase the next damage dealt by that target to another target by 2.
Discard up to 2 cards.

cards.title: Half Rest
body: Each other player may draw a card or have their hero regain 2 HP.
You may discard a card.

cards.title: Harmonize
body: Draw a card, discard a card, or play a card.
Draw a card, discard a card, or play a card.

cards.title: Inspiring Refrain
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 3 cards and up to 3 targets regain 2 HP.

cards.title: Interference
body: {Symphony} deals 1 target 1 sonic damage. Until the start of your turn, reduce damage dealt by that target by 1.
You may discard a card.

cards.title: Nano-Fabrication
body: Another player may discard a card.
If they do, they may play a non-one-shot card.
If not, search your deck and trash for a non-one-shot card and put it into your hand or into play. If you searched your deck, shuffle it.

cards.title: Obstacle Avoidance
body: Reduce damage dealt to {Symphony} by non-hero sources by 1.
At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
At the end of your turn, draw 3 cards.

cards.title: Pianissimo
body: Select a target. Reduce the next damage dealt to that target by another target by 2.
Discard up to 2 cards.

cards.title: Solo
body: One hero may use a power.
You may return this card to your hand.

cards.title: Sour Note
body: At the end of your play phase, if you have 8 or more cards in hand, {Symphony} deals itself 3 irreducible psychic damage and you may destroy this card.
powers: {Symphony} deals 1 target 3 sonic damage. Draw 2 cards.

cards.title: Tune-Up
body: Draw up to 4 cards.
Discard up to 5 cards.

cards.title: Whole Rest
body: Destroy any number of your non-character cards. {Symphony} regains that much HP.
Discard any number of cards. X other targets regain 2 HP each, where X is the number of cards discarded this way.
Immediately end your turn.
